tasks.subject: Task 1: ext-server CMake — 加插件开关 option
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 让 cmake 关闭 calculator / wsl_tools 时不生成对应 .so, 默认行为不变

**Files:**
- Modify: `ext/server/CMakeLists.txt:25-87`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 默认 (不传新 option) calculator + wsl_tools + synology_tools 三个 .so 全部生成
- [ ] 传 `-DMCP_BUILD_CALCULATOR_PLUGIN=OFF -DMCP_BUILD_WSL_PLUGIN=OFF` 后, build/plugins/ 下只有 libsynology_tools.so

**Verify:** cmake -B /tmp/test -DMCP_BUILD_EXT=ON -DMCP_BUILD_SYNOLOGY_EXAMPLE=ON -DMCP_BUILD_CALCULATOR_PLUGIN=OFF -DMCP_BUILD_WSL_PLUGIN=OFF; cmake --build; ls /tmp/test/plugins/ → 期望只 1 个 .so

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ext/server/CMakeLists.txt"], "verifyCommand": "ls /tmp/test-cmake-off/plugins/ | wc -l → 1", "acceptanceCriteria": ["默认 3 个 .so", "OFF 时只 1 个 .so"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: ext-server — 读 MCP_LISTEN_HOST/PORT
tasks.description:
**Goal:** mcp-ext-server 启动时从环境变量读监听地址, 默认 127.0.0.1:8888, 容器内 override 成 0.0.0.0:8888

**Files:**
- Modify: `ext/server/src/main.cpp:42-44`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 不传 env 时启动日志仍是 `Starting MCP server at localhost:8888`
- [ ] 传 MCP_LISTEN_HOST=0.0.0.0 MCP_LISTEN_PORT=9999 后日志变成 0.0.0.0:9999
- [ ] ss -ltn 看到 server 绑在 override 后的地址

**Verify:** MCP_LISTEN_HOST=0.0.0.0 MCP_LISTEN_PORT=9999 ./build/ext/server/mcp-ext-server → ss -ltn | grep :9999

```json:metadata
{"files": ["ext/server/src/main.cpp"], "verifyCommand": "ss -ltn | grep :9999", "acceptanceCriteria": ["默认行为兼容", "env 覆盖生效"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Docker scaffold (.dockerignore + .env.example)
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 建立 examples/synology-nas/docker/ 目录的两个最小辅助文件

**Files:**
- Create: `examples/synology-nas/docker/.dockerignore`
- Create: `examples/synology-nas/docker/.env.example`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 两个文件存在且内容正确
- [ ] .dockerignore 排除 build/、.venv、.git、docs 等

**Verify:** ls -la examples/synology-nas/docker/; cat 两个文件

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/synology-nas/docker/.dockerignore", "examples/synology-nas/docker/.env.example"], "verifyCommand": "ls examples/synology-nas/docker/", "acceptanceCriteria": ["两个文件存在", "内容覆盖规范"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: 创建 entrypoint.sh
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 容器启动脚本, 校验 env / 写后端 .env / 起后端等健康 / exec ext-server / trap SIGTERM

**Files:**
- Create: `examples/synology-nas/docker/entrypoint.sh`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 缺任一必填 env → exit 2 + stderr 写明缺哪个
- [ ] 后端 30s 内没起来 / 中途死掉 → exit 1
- [ ] 后端起来后 exec ext-server
- [ ] trap 在 SIGTERM 时 kill 后端
- [ ] shellcheck 通过

**Verify:** shellcheck entrypoint.sh; env -i BACKEND_TOKEN=t entrypoint.sh → 期望 "missing required env SYNOLOGY_HOST"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/synology-nas/docker/entrypoint.sh"], "verifyCommand": "shellcheck examples/synology-nas/docker/entrypoint.sh", "acceptanceCriteria": ["缺 env 报错", "后端健康检查", "信号处理"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: 创建多阶段 Dockerfile
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 多阶段构建, builder 编 mcp-ext-server + libsynology_tools.so, runtime 塞 tini + 二进制 + uv 同步的 Python 后端, 配置 HEALTHCHECK

**Files:**
- Create: `examples/synology-nas/docker/Dockerfile`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] docker build 成功
- [ ] 镜像 < 250 MB
- [ ] HEALTHCHECK 配置存在
- [ ] docker history 看不到明文密码

**Verify:** docker build -f examples/synology-nas/docker/Dockerfile -t mcp-synology:test .; docker images; docker inspect

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/synology-nas/docker/Dockerfile"], "verifyCommand": "docker images mcp-synology:test --format '{{.Size}}'", "acceptanceCriteria": ["build 成功", "size < 250MB", "HEALTHCHECK 配置", "无凭据泄漏"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: 创建 docker/README.md
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 自包含用法文档, 覆盖快速开始 / env 变量 / Claude Code + Codex 接入 / 故障排查

**Files:**
- Create: `examples/synology-nas/docker/README.md`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 文档覆盖: clone+build+run 完整命令、env 表、Claude Code mcpServers JSON、Codex config.toml、docker logs 排查
- [ ] 显式说明 build context 必须是 cpp-mcp 项目根
- [ ] 无真实凭据

**Verify:** grep -E "^## " → 期望看到 5+ 个章节

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/synology-nas/docker/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "grep -E '^## ' examples/synology-nas/docker/README.md | wc -l", "acceptanceCriteria": ["5+ 章节", "Claude + Codex 接入", "无真实凭据"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: 更新 examples/synology-nas/README.md 加 Docker 指针
tasks.description:
**Goal:** examples/synology-nas/README.md 顶部加一段指向 docker/README.md 的 callout

**Files:**
- Modify: `examples/synology-nas/README.md:1`

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 文件顶部有指向 docker/README.md 的 callout 块
- [ ] 原内容一字不动

**Verify:** head -10 examples/synology-nas/README.md → 期望第一行是 "> 想直接跑?"

```json:metadata
{"files": ["examples/synology-nas/README.md"], "verifyCommand": "head -3 examples/synology-nas/README.md", "acceptanceCriteria": ["callout 在顶部", "原内容保留"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 8: 构建并端到端验证镜像
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 用占位符凭据起容器, 验证: 起来 + healthy + initialize 200 + tools/list=16 + 缺 env 报错 + stop < 10s

**Files:** (无)

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] docker run 起来后 30s 内 healthy
- [ ] curl initialize 200
- [ ] tools/list 返回正好 16 个工具
- [ ] 缺 SYNOLOGY_HOST 时容器 exit 2, log 有 missing required env
- [ ] docker stop < 10s 清场

**Verify:** 见 plan Task 8 的 verify 块, 一连串 curl + docker inspect

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "docker inspect -f '{{.State.Health.Status}}' $CID", "acceptanceCriteria": ["healthy < 30s", "tools count = 16", "缺 env 报错", "stop < 10s"], "requiresUserVerification": false}
```

tasks.subject: Task 9: 用户真实凭据验证
tasks.description:
**Goal:** 用户用真实 NAS 凭据跑一次, 确认 list_shares 真实返回共享目录

**Files:** (无)

**User Verification Required:**
Before marking this task complete, you MUST call AskUserQuestion:
```yaml
AskUserQuestion:
  question: "用你真实的 NAS 凭据跑完 `docker run` + `tools/call list_shares` 之后, 结果如何?"
  header: "真实凭据验证"
  options:
    - label: "成功, 拿到共享目录"
      description: "list_shares 返回了你的真实共享目录 (docker, download, ...), 整套打包对你来说可用"
    - label: "失败, 需要排查"
      description: "容器起来但 list_shares 报错 / 返回空 / 连接失败, 给出 docker logs 关键片段"
```

**Acceptance Criteria:**
- [ ] 用户用真实凭据启动容器
- [ ] tools/call list_shares 真实返回用户的共享目录
- [ ] 用户的 MCP 客户端 (Claude Code 或 Codex) 能连 http://localhost:8888/mcp 看到 16 个工具

```json:metadata
{"files": [], "verifyCommand": "", "acceptanceCriteria": ["user confirms real-NAS tool call works end-to-end"], "requiresUserVerification": true, "userVerificationPrompt": "用真实 NAS 凭据跑通 `tools/call list_shares` 了吗? 返回的是不是你的真实共享目录?"}
```
